Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long LINC dominates today's ranking at #1 with a score of 95.2, displaying exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—1272% over 10 years, 520% over 5 years, and 156% over 1 year—while consistently outperforming SPY by 1034 percentage points over the decade. The stock passes all four momentum ratio tests, trades above all four moving averages (30/50/100/200), and shows a "clean" momentum signal with confirmed volatility, resulting in a "strong_buy" flag. CLMT ranks second with a score in the mid-80s range but displays a critical weakness: its 10-year return of 151% dramatically underperforms its 5-year return of 516%, with a ratio_10y_5y of only 0.29, and it actually trails SPY by 87 percentage points over the past decade, suggesting momentum may be recent rather than sustained. Both stocks pass all moving average and ratio tests, but LINC's superior decade-long consistency and massive outperformance versus major indices distinguishes it as the stronger momentum candidate by the dashboard's long-term optimization criteria.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
